mapper.sql: t.id, t.refund_id, t.refund_no, t.order_id, t.payment_id, t.refund_scene, t.refund_amount, t.refund_status, t.approval_id, t.external_refund_no, t.apply_time, t.refund_time, t.fail_reason, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_refund t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_refund t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_refund t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_refund ( refund_id, refund_no, order_id, payment_id, refund_scene, refund_amount, refund_status, approval_id, external_refund_no, apply_time, refund_time, fail_reason, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{refundId}, #{refundNo}, #{orderId}, #{paymentId}, #{refundScene}, #{refundAmount}, #{refundStatus}, #{approvalId}, #{externalRefundNo}, #{applyTime}, #{refundTime}, #{failReason}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_refund ( refund_id, refund_no, order_id, payment_id, refund_scene, refund_amount, refund_status, approval_id, external_refund_no, apply_time, refund_time, fail_reason, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.refundId}, #{item.refundNo}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.paymentId}, #{item.refundScene}, #{item.refundAmount}, #{item.refundStatus}, #{item.approvalId}, #{item.externalRefundNo}, #{item.applyTime}, #{item.refundTime}, #{item.failReason}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_refund t SET
t.refund_status = #{refundStatus},
t.external_refund_no = #{externalRefundNo},
t.refund_time = #{refundTime},
t.fail_reason = #{failReason},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_refund t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
